name: Docket Watch & Litigation Monitor
description: Monitors court dockets for a matter or portfolio of matters — pulls recent filings, flags upcoming deadlines, and summarises procedural developments. Uses CourtListener and Trellis.
promptTemplate: Monitor the litigation docket for {{party}} in {{court}}. Pull all filings from the last {{lookback_days}} days, identify any upcoming hearing dates, filing deadlines, or responsive pleading deadlines in the next 30 days, and summarise the current procedural posture. Flag anything requiring immediate action.

substitutions.court: US District Court for the Southern District of New York
